response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong technical breadth and leadership in full-stack development, with experience in scalable systems, AI tooling, and open-source platforms. While his background lacks direct experimentation platform experience, his architectural contributions, cross-team collaboration, and hands-on coding align well with the role's core requirements. Further assessment of his experimentation and data-aptitude skills is warranted.
strengths: Proven track record designing and shipping scalable systems (e.g., micro-services at Sociomantic, AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq).
Strong technical leadership with cross-functional collaboration (e.g., pricing optimization at Optilyz, open-source GIS platform).
Diverse language proficiency (Python, JavaScript/TypeScript, D, C/C++) and hands-on production experience.
concerns: Limited explicit experimentation platform or feature-flagging experience in resume highlights.
No direct mention of metrics/telemetry infrastructure or statistical analysis for experimentation.
Principal-level roles typically require deeper specialization in growth/measurement systems.
